stimulus:
Welcome!

In this study, you will play three short video games that were generated by Artificial Intelligence (AI) and complete a short survey after each game.

Please make sure you are in a quiet environment where you can focus for the duration of the study. Some games may use sound, so please ensure that your device's volume is not muted.

Press any key to begin.
Press any key to proceed to the first video game. Should you encounter a game-breaking bug, please report the issue in the Menu tab to the right of the screen.

response: {"creativity-rating":4,"creativity-free-response":"I found it creative because it's a musical game that helps you train your sense of rhythm. Besides, the song was entertaining, and it's an idea I had never seen before. Additionally if each level has different songs, this greatly expands the game's possibilities, which prevents it from ever becoming repetitive.  ","originality-rating":5,"originality-free-response":"I found the game original because I had never played a similar one before, and I thought it was a great way to listen to music. In general, I like music games, and I also really liked all the sound effects. I enjoyed all the sounds in the game. But it was not really surprising, it was fun. Especially because the game looked very simple, it was just a few dots. ","effectiveness-rating":3,"effectiveness-free-response":"The game was enjoyable because of the music, the sounds, and the fact that the idea felt new and original to me. However, the level of detail was not good enough. It didn't have many visual details, it looked very simple and somewhat empty. Sometime the functionality was bugged, specially with the pink dot. Sometimes, I think the game didn't properly detect the rhythm when I pressed the space bar, I believe it has some bugs. But overall, it was entertaining because you try to follow the rhythm of each dot to feed it. At the end it was entertaining. ","authenticity-rating":4,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":3,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"The game felt authentic to me because I had never heard of a similar one before, and considering all the years I've spent playing different types of games, I think that's an important point to consider. However, I don't think the developer put that much effort into making the game, it feels somewhat empty. Although it does manage to vbe a little bit entertaining, I'm not sure how long I would play it. The game was't reflected in the game's design, starting with the menu, it was just simple text.  "}

response: {"creativity-rating":4,"creativity-free-response":"I found the game creative because you don't just control one object or character at a time, in this case there were two objects, which forces you to use both hands and coordinate them in order to win. I think it's a good game for training motor coordination.  ","originality-rating":1,"originality-free-response":"The game didn't really have a narrative. It didn't even have a proper menu or an explanation of why it's called The Static Between Us, or something like that. You just start playing the game right away. That's why the game's narrative or story is essentially nonexistent, although the title might give it a slight sense of originality.   ","effectiveness-rating":4,"effectiveness-free-response":"I was surprisingly quite fond of the game. What makes it so enjoyable is that you have to guide two objects at the same time so they reach the same point, but in a mirrored way, meaning you do the same movements, but sometimes in opposite directions. This game has a lot of potential. ","authenticity-rating":4,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":2,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"I think this game is truly authentic because I had never played anything similar before. I believe it's a very good game for training coordination between both hands, which also makes it exciting, since it gives you the feeling that playing it could actually benefit your brain health in some way. However, I don't think much effort was put into it. To begin with, the game didn't have a menu, you simply start playing and there aren't many explanations about why you are playing. It has no story and no real introduction. Tho objects and mechanic move well, and overall the game the game functions properly, but the design was far below my expectations. It wasn't visually appealing. "}
